steps.title: Subtract 40 from both sides to isolate x
steps.content:
The equation $x + 40 = 95$ has $x$ added to 40. To isolate $x$, subtract 40 from both sides:

$$x + 40 - 40 = 95 - 40$$

steps.title: Simplify to find x
steps.content:
On the left: $x + 40 - 40 = x$
On the right: $95 - 40 = 55$

$$x = 55$$
